parsed_review.summary: CP00-931 is a descriptor-only HRX bridge pack (RP30.P04.M06.S09-RP30.P04.M08.S01, 10 units, risk A) binding 1 HROperations tail row (M06.S09), 8 EmployeePortal foundation rows (M07.S01-S08), and 1 CandidatePortal foundation row (M08.S01), all deliverable_type=implementation. Read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob only) confirms implementation, validators, tests, contract projection, and evidence consistently enforce the descriptor-only boundary. Pack identity is consistent end-to-end: HRX_CP931_PACK_BINDING (packages/hrx/src/registry.js:661-676) matches the manifest plan_binding_snapshot, review-baseline.json, and authoritative docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json:392-412 (same source_ledger_sha 13c7ed65..., hrx_source_ledger_sha 2077f543...); range, unit_count=10, risk_class A, upstream CP00-930, next CP00-932/RP30.P04.M08.S02, deviation_from_plan=false. Deliverable distribution {implementation:10} and micro-title distribution {HROperations:1, EmployeePortal:8, CandidatePortal:1} match HRX_CP931_REQUIREMENTS (registry.js:2493-2535) and the baseline units exactly. createHrxCp931HrOperationsEmployeeCandidatePortalBridgeDescriptor (registry.js:7588-7670) plus createHrxDomainRows (registry.js:2586-2814) set all runtime/record-write/policy-execution/finalization/self-service/permission-bypass and real employee/candidate/payroll/document data flags false, set HROperations/EmployeePortal/CandidatePortal descriptor + entity_name flags correctly, and spread HRX_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION. validateHrxCp931...Coverage (validators.js:5955), validateHrxCp931...Descriptor (validators.js:5994), and validateHrxPeopleContract machine-enforce row-, entity-, baseline-, capability-, safety-gate-, and attestation-level boundaries and are exercised by packages/hrx/test/model.test.js:1793-1875 asserting zero errors against the real contract. The regenerated contracts/hrx-people-contract.json carries current_pack/latest_pack CP00-931, latest_projection HrxCp931HrOperationsEmployeeCandidatePortalBridgeDescriptor, and the four new CP931 capabilities plus twelve new safety gates and no-leak guards. scripts/validate-rp30-hrx-people-contract.mjs chains CP897->CP931 upstream/next/subphase plus coverage/descriptor/contract validation. Authority boundary holds: Claude read-only and not final approver (claude_packet.read_only=true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false; authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false), local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true (runtime opening deferred to CP00-932), Hermes deterministic-only (emits_runtime_receipt=false, deterministic_only=true) and not product runtime. Pack metadata correctly reports production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false / status=in_progress / descriptor_only=true pending this review; no runtime or enterprise-trust claim is made, so this CP closeout goal is not blocked by the human/enterprise-trust authority boundary. Review-hardening checks pass: auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1434-byte well-formed JSON), model claude-opus-4-8/max/read_only, tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob (forbidden_tools_present=false), prompt 2425 bytes within the 25600 limit; no 0-byte stdout, malformed JSON, fenced-prose, or tool-call-shaped output in the evidence pipeline. The unrelated docs/ldip-integration/claude-review-results/c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json belongs to a separate LDIP workstream and is correctly listed among unrelated_dirty_files_preserved, not this pack. No P0/P1/P2 issues found. One non-blocking P3 notes that command-evidence.json records only the five HRX-scoped commands (all exit 0) while the full 10-command validation ladder + Hermes control-plane gate are pending_final_validation and the closeout artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) remain in the expected pre-review pending state; boundaries were verified by read-only source inspection and reported exit codes are treated as reported, not independently re-run. Verdict: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS for the descriptor-only scope; does not block pack closeout or this CP closeout goal.

findings.title: Full closeout validation ladder and Hermes control-plane gate recorded as pending_final_validation; closeout artifacts in expected pre-review pending state; reviewer verified boundaries by read-only source inspection
findings.details: command-evidence.json records exit_code 0 for five HRX-scoped commands (node --check on packages/hrx/src/registry.js, packages/hrx/src/validators.js, and scripts/validate-rp30-hrx-people-contract.mjs; node --test packages/hrx/test/*.test.js; npm run rp30:hrx:validate), but hermes_gate.status is 'pending' (command_ids []), gate_outcome is 'pending_final_validation', and validation_summary has review_receipt_ref=null and p0_p1_p2_clear=null. The broader ladder named in the prompt (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) is not yet recorded as executed. Consistently, claude-review-result.json shows status=pending_review with review_receipt_ref=null and exactly_one_valid_pack_level_claude_review_run=false, adjudication.md is PENDING, and construction-inspection.json verdict is PENDING with pack_level_claude_review_completed=false and hrx_hr_operations_employee_candidate_portal_bridge_descriptor_verified=false. These are the expected inputs to this read-only review, not defects. As a read-only reviewer I confirmed cross-layer consistency and closed boundaries by inspecting registry.js, validators.js, model.test.js, contracts/hrx-people-contract.json, closeout-pack-plan.json, and the pack artifacts; reported command exit codes are treated as reported evidence, not independently re-run.
findings.recommendation: Before flipping manifest status to closed and setting production_ready_flag=hrx_hr_operations_employee_candidate_portal_bridge_descriptor_verified, run and record the full validation ladder plus the Hermes control-plane/spec-requirement gate green, finalize adjudication.md and construction-inspection.json, and attach this read-only review as the single valid pack-level review receipt.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected pre-closeout snapshot state; non-blocking. The Codex closeout owner completes the final validation ladder and finalizes adjudication.md/construction-inspection.json after this read-only review; this finding does not affect the PASS verdict on the descriptor-only scope.
